sourceScope.sourceTitle: Educational Note: Guidance for the 2022 Reporting on Capital and Financial Condition Testing for Life, P&C, and Mortgage Insurers
sourceScope.sourceReference: Canadian Institute of Actuaries educational note, February 2022
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Educational note / companion guidance; not authoritative regulatory text.

observedSectionWindows.note: Front matter, memorandum, and background guidance.
Capital requirements and FCT overview for 2022.
Additional guidance, climate, COVID-19, ORSA, reinsurance, and model-use references.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single educational note file.
Do not widen into other educational notes or broader practice-note files in the same folder.
Keep VM-20, VM-21, VM-22, VM-30, VM-31, AG, and regulation references review-only unless the same batch intentionally includes the referenced operational text.
Keep the educational-note caveat visible as companion-guidance context, not as authoritative regulatory text.
Use page locators as the primary citation anchor; line references are not expected for this PDF slice.
exclusions: No full-document processing outside this source file.
No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other educational note files in the same wave.
